failedAssertions.reason: Frontend CreateBenchmarkRequest sends field names 'scenarios'/'personas' but backend expects 'selected_scenarios'/'selected_personas'. All benchmark submissions from the UI fail with HTTP 422. Fix: update frontend/src/api/types.ts CreateBenchmarkRequest and SubmitPage.tsx to use 'selected_scenarios'/'selected_personas'.

ReportPage does not implement a 'Back to Benchmark' link. BenchmarkPage correctly passes ?benchmark={id} in View Report links but ReportPage.tsx does not consume this query parameter and renders no back-to-benchmark navigation element. Fix: read benchmark query param in ReportPage and conditionally render 'Back to Benchmark' link.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: regulatory-pdf milestone not yet implemented. Compliance PDF endpoint (GET /api/audits/{id}/report/compliance-pdf) returns 404. This assertion requires the regulatory-pdf milestone to be complete.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Benchmark Mode Test Data' section with pre-created benchmark ID, audit IDs, trust scores, and key URLs for benchmark testing.
